required_artifacts: P4 risk and position-sizing owner report
P5 supervised demo-trade readiness owner report

final_owner_sentence: AIOS Forex P5 C1 supervised demo-trade readiness review is complete: c1-eur-buy is source-cleared for P6 demo-order intent and owner-approval gate only, while demo order placement, live trading, broker/API, credentials, money movement, 22/6 autonomy, vacation/luxury mode, and 100-120 percent return claims remain blocked until separately proven and approved.

kill_switch_rules.required_state: active and untriggered before any P6 owner decision
kill_switch_rules.rule: Any trigger blocks P6 owner review until repair evidence is generated and P5 or P6 is rerun.
triggers: daily loss at or above 1.00 percent
weekly loss at or above 2.00 percent
more than one order for the same signal
credential, account, broker/API, order, scheduler, daemon, webhook, production, or autonomy path detected

one_order_rules.rule: C1 may have no more than one open position and no more than one order for the same signal during later owner review.

owner_approval_gate.approval_scope: P6 demo-order intent owner-approval gate only
owner_approval_gate.rule: The owner must review a later P6 intent card before any demo-order placement can be considered.

broker_account_dependency_block.p5_requirement: A later supervised demo-readiness review must supply a sanitized broker/account snapshot before any real position size can be calculated.
broker_account_dependency_block.reason: This P4 review defines formulas and guardrails only; it must not read credentials, balances, account identifiers, broker data, or live prices.

blocked_inputs: real account equity in this P4 review
position_sizing_formula.real_sizing_block: Real sizing is blocked until a later supervised demo-readiness review supplies a sanitized broker/account snapshot.

review_only_boundary: demo trading without later evidence gate

broker_account_dependency_block.p5_requirement: A later supervised demo-readiness review must supply a sanitized broker/account snapshot before any real position size can be calculated.
broker_account_dependency_block.reason: This P4 review defines formulas and guardrails only; it must not read credentials, balances, account identifiers, broker data, or live prices.

kill_switch_triggers: daily loss at or above 1.00 percent
weekly loss at or above 2.00 percent
more than one order for the same signal
broker/account dependency requested before sanitized P5 snapshot
credential, account, broker/API, order, scheduler, daemon, webhook, production, or autonomy path detected

audit_requirements.evidence: P5 requires generated evidence and manual owner review before any later demo-order intent decision.

conservative_limits.evidence: P5 keeps P4 conservative defaults: 0.25 percent per trade, 1.00 percent daily, 2.00 percent weekly, one open position, one order per signal, and at least 1.20 reward-to-risk.

demo_safety_boundary.evidence: Demo-only review remains bounded, while live trading, broker/API, credentials, order placement, money movement, and autonomy remain blocked.

kill_switch_rules.evidence: Kill-switch verification remains required before P6.

one_order_rule.evidence: One open position and one order per signal are required.

owner_approval_gate.evidence: Owner approval is required in P6 before any demo-order placement can be considered.

p4_entry_condition.evidence: P4 must be passed for P5 review, score 100, P5-ready, with empty failed requirements and review-only boundaries.

required_readiness_rules_present.evidence: All required P5 readiness policy keys must exist.

snapshot_requirement.evidence: A sanitized broker/account snapshot is required later and is not collected in this packet.

stop_rules.evidence: Daily and weekly stop rules remain required.

tp_sl_guardrails.evidence: A stop loss, take profit, and at least 1.20 reward-to-risk are required for later owner review.

snapshot_requirement.purpose: Provide enough demo-account state for owner review without exposing secrets, credentials, account identifiers, broker order identifiers, or private execution payloads.
snapshot_requirement.required_before: P6 demo-order intent owner-approval gate can calculate or review any account-specific position size.

source_evidence.use: Provides the authoritative P4 risk and position-sizing evaluator consumed by this P5 readiness review.
Records P4 review status, P5 readiness, score, failed requirements, and next lane.
Explains the source-backed P4 decision and preserves the no demo or live trading boundary.
Routes the source-cleared candidate into P5 supervised demo-trade readiness review only.
Defines the root safety boundary for trading, credentials, broker access, order action, and fail-closed behavior.

stop_rules.rule: P6 must prove daily and weekly loss state remains inside the 0.25 percent per-trade, 1.00 percent daily, and 2.00 percent weekly limits before owner review can continue.

tp_sl_guardrails.rule: A later P6 intent card must specify stop loss, take profit, and at least 1.20 reward-to-risk before owner review can proceed.
